name: agent-mindmap
description: Read Cursor or Claude Code agent chat transcripts and visualize them as an interactive mind map.

agentMindmap.host.description: Which AI product's on-disk transcripts to read. auto = detect from app name and existing transcript folders.

agentMindmap.cursorStateDb.description: Override path to Cursor's globalStorage state.vscdb. Empty = platform default (Linux: ~/.config/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb; macOS: ~/Library/Application Support/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb; Windows: %APPDATA%/Cursor/User/globalStorage/state.vscdb). Used to read sidebar composer titles for human-readable session labels.

agentMindmap.includeToolCalls.description: [Fallback view only] Include tool-call branches under each user question.

agentMindmap.maxConclusionItems.description: [Fallback view only] Maximum conclusion sub-nodes per question.
agentMindmap.maxConclusionItems.deprecationMessage: Used only when LLM summarization fails. Configure agentMindmap.maxTopics / maxItemsPerTopic for the default topic view.

agentMindmap.autoRefresh.description: Watch the active transcript file and refresh the mind map.

agentMindmap.llm.provider.description: LLM provider for topic extraction. auto follows agentMindmap.host (cursor-cli or claude-cli).

agentMindmap.llm.cliPath.description: Path to the headless CLI binary. Empty = auto-detect (Cursor: agent/cursor-agent; Claude: claude).

agentMindmap.llm.model.description: Optional model name passed to the CLI via --model. Empty uses the CLI default.

agentMindmap.llm.timeoutMs.description: Hard timeout (ms) for a single CLI subprocess call. Total budget per summarisation is roughly timeoutMs * maxAttempts.

agentMindmap.llm.maxAttempts.description: Maximum number of cursor-agent attempts per summarisation. Retries are triggered by timeout / cli-failed / bad-json / bad-shape; cli-missing / cancelled / empty are not retried.

agentMindmap.llm.retryBackoffMs.description: Base backoff (ms) between retries. Effective wait is base * 2^(attempt-1) with ±25% jitter, capped at 10s.

agentMindmap.maxTopics.description: Target number of top-level topic nodes the LLM should produce.

agentMindmap.maxItemsPerTopic.description: Maximum sub-items (knowledge points / references) per topic.

agentMindmap.cacheLlmResult.description: Cache the LLM topic graph keyed by transcript hash to avoid re-spending tokens. By default this is stored under storeDir/llm-cache; override via agentMindmap.llm.cacheDir.

agentMindmap.llm.cacheDir.description: Path to the LLM cache directory. Empty = <storeDir>/llm-cache.

agentMindmap.storeDir.description: Path to the cross-project analysis library directory. Empty = ~/.agent-mindmap. Supports a leading ~/. Point at a sync folder (iCloud / Dropbox) to share the library across machines.

agentMindmap.library.enabled.description: Persist each analysed session to storeDir as a SessionRecord with meta, and skip the LLM call on reopen if the transcript is unchanged. Disable to fall back to the old globalStorage hash-only cache.

agentMindmap.merge.autoRebuildDeterminis.description: After a session is analysed and written to the library, automatically rebuild storeDir/merges/deterministic.json so 'Open Merged View' opens instantly.

agentMindmap.merge.llm.maxTopics.description: Target number of top-level topic nodes the LLM merge command should produce across selected sessions.

agentMindmap.merge.llm.maxItemsPerTopic.description: Maximum sub-items per topic the LLM merge command should produce.

agentMindmap.ui.preset.description: Mind map color preset. auto follows the editor theme; dark and light use mind-elixir built-in themes.

agentMindmap.ui.direction.description: Mind map layout direction: both sides with first branch on the right (side, default), left only, or right only.

agentMindmap.ui.themeFile.description: Optional JSON file overriding palette and CSS variables (cssVar). Empty = no file. Supports workspace-relative paths, ~/..., or absolute paths.
